conservative.name: Steal Fate
conservative.requirements: 4 favour. Target within close range. if you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: You steal a portion of the target's destiny and bestow it upon another. The target's wound threshold is reduced by 1, and you or another character within close range of you has his wound threshold increased by 1. Both effects last until the end of the encounter
As above, but reduced by 2 and increased by 2 instead

boon.description: The target gains the Sluggish condition for 2 rounds

reckless.name: Steal Fate
reckless.requirements: 5 favour. Target within close range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: You steal a portion of the target's destiny and bestow it upon another. The target's wound threshold is reduced by 1, and you or another character within close range of you has his wound threshold increased by 1. Both effects last until the end of the encounter
As above, but reduced by 2 and increased by 2 instead
As above, but reduced by 3 and increased by 3 instead

boon.description: The target gains the Sluggish condition for 2 rounds
